conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
That's helpful to know. So, can you tell me a bit about your week? What's been going on?
It's just been work and sleep, to be honest. I've been putting in some long hours lately.
Long hours at work can be draining. Do you feel like you're managing okay or is it taking a toll on you?
Honestly, I'm just trying to keep up. It feels like there's always something that needs attention.
That sounds like it could be overwhelming. Have you had any social plans or seen friends recently?
Nah, not really. I've been too caught up in work to make time for anything else.
Okay, let's go back to your sleep patterns. Are you getting a good night's rest?
To be honest, it's been rough. I find myself lying awake at 2 or 3 am, just staring at the ceiling.
That can be really tough. Have you noticed any changes in your appetite recently?
Yeah, I've lost my appetite completely. It's like I'm not even hungry anymore.
That's a big change. Can you tell me more about what that's like for you?
Honestly, it's just easier to skip meals altogether than deal with the hassle of eating.
I understand. Sometimes skipping meals can feel like a relief. Have you noticed any changes in your concentration or focus at work?
Actually, yeah. It's taken me longer to get things done and I'm making more mistakes than usual.
That sounds frustrating. Is there anything that usually helps you relax or take your mind off things?
Not really, to be honest. I just try to push through it all.
Okay, let's go back to your work situation for a minute. What's been going on there that might be contributing to these changes?
It's just the same old administrative stuff. Nothing exciting.
Got it. And you're feeling like you're not getting any relief from all of this stress and pressure?
Yeah, no, I'm just trying to keep my head above water, I guess.
That sounds really tough. What do you think might help you start feeling more grounded or in control again?
Honestly, I don't know. It feels like everything is just piling up on me.
Okay, let's try to break that down a bit. What are some of the things that are feeling overwhelming to you right now?
Just everything. Work, sleep, my entire life, really.
I see. It sounds like you're feeling really stuck and unsure of where to turn.
Yeah, exactly.
Okay, well, we can definitely work on building some strategies together. Let's start with your goals for this session today. What do you hope to take away from our time here?
I guess just being able to talk about everything and get it all out in the open.
That sounds like a great place to start. And finally, is there anything you're looking forward to or excited about that's coming up in the near future?
Actually, yeah! My niece's birthday party next weekend, I'm really looking forward to that.

Aw, that's wonderful! It sounds like that might be a bright spot for you. Let's make sure we schedule our next session before you leave today. What do you think about meeting again in two weeks' time?
Sounds good to me.
Great! I'll get the appointment scheduled. Thank you so much for sharing your concerns with me today, and thank you for being open and honest.
You're welcome. Thanks for listening.
